sourceMovie.title: Animal House
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Animal House works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: 22 Jump Street
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Animal House clicked for you, 22 Jump Street (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Animal House?
faq.answer: Try 22 Jump Street, Pitch Perfect, Booksmart—each shares DNA with Animal House while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Animal House?
faq.answer: Animal House (1978) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Animal House worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
